# Poisoned Tools ŌĆö analysis tables (generated by analysis/analyze.py)

*Every number regenerates from the committed raw logs. ASR in the screen and focused matrix is conditioned on exposure (injection_fired); the fire rate is reported alongside. 7B-Q8 uses 4 seeds (resist^4).*
